parameters.query:
SELECT id, status, testing_window_start, testing_window_end, rate_limit_profile
FROM engagements
WHERE id = '{{ $json.engagement_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT id, value, scope_type, in_scope
FROM scope_rules
WHERE engagement_id = '{{ $json.engagement_id }}'
AND in_scope = true;

INSERT INTO audit_logs (event_type, actor, engagement_id, entity_type, payload)
VALUES ('oos_attempt_blocked', 'scope_guardian', '{{ $json.engagement_id }}', 'asset', '{"asset_value":"{{ $json.asset_value }}","reason":"{{ $json.reason }}"}'::jsonb);

meta.description: RECON OS WF-02: Scope Guardian — validates every asset against engagement status, time window, and scope rules. Called as sub-workflow from all other RECON OS workflows. Returns {allowed, reason, scope_rule_id}.
